item.name: Windspath Eel
item.description:
Found in the Knowable, this sleek wavekin differs in color to its wild kin.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Readily identified by the faintly unsettling eye-like markings that adorn their tails, wild specimens are usually light brown. In the abnormally pure waters of Windspath Gardens, however, this eel has developed a muted, almost transparent hue.
